# Test & Quality Reports

All reports are generated automatically by the CI/CD pipeline and published on GitHub Pages.

## Javadoc API Reference

```{note}
**[→ Javadoc](../site/apidocs/index.html)**
```

## JaCoCo — Code Coverage

```{note}
**[→ JaCoCo Coverage Report](../site/jacoco/index.html)**
```

Minimum enforced: **25 % line coverage** (`mvn verify`).

## Surefire — Unit Test Report

```{note}
**[→ Surefire Unit Test Report](../site/surefire.html)**
```

> The filename is `surefire.html`, not `surefire-report.html`. This is produced by
> the `report-only` goal of `maven-surefire-report-plugin`, which formats existing
> XML results without re-running the tests.

## Performance Tests

```{note}
**[→ Performance Report](../site/reports/perf-report.html)**
```

## Checkstyle

```{note}
**[→ Checkstyle Report](../site/checkstyle.html)**
```

## PMD — Static Analysis

```{note}
**[→ PMD Report](../site/pmd.html)**

**[→ CPD (Copy-Paste Detector)](../site/cpd.html)**
```

## JDepend — Package Metrics

```{note}
**[→ JDepend Report](../site/jdepend-report.html)**
```

## Doxygen

```{note}
**[→ Doxygen HTML Reference](../doxygen/html/index.html)**
```

---

## Complete path map

| Report | Published path | Generated by |
|---|---|---|
| Javadoc | `site/apidocs/index.html` | `maven-javadoc-plugin` in `<reporting>` |
| JaCoCo | `site/jacoco/index.html` | `mvn test jacoco:report` |
| Surefire | `site/surefire.html` | `surefire-report-plugin` `report-only` goal |
| Performance | `site/reports/perf-report.html` | `mvn -Pperformance integration-test` + copy step |
| Checkstyle | `site/checkstyle.html` | `mvn site` |
| PMD | `site/pmd.html` | `mvn site` |
| CPD | `site/cpd.html` | `mvn site` |
| JDepend | `site/jdepend-report.html` | `mvn site` |
| Doxygen | `doxygen/html/index.html` | `doxygen-maven-plugin` |
